MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Moser Companies is present. Represented by Ezequiel Cazares.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Jose Palacios and Muriela Palacios are present.
Attorney Hope Greehnill representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of DEC-5-2011 is vacated.
